NIO Electric Cars Could Become an Iconic Brand, Says Analyst

“We continue to see compelling evidence that NIO [NIO] is increasingly perceived by customers as a high-quality premium brand with best-in-class technology and service,” he adds. He says NIO has a high referral rate by existing owners and that its brand has favorability scores above BMW (BMW.Germany) and Daimler’s (DAI.Germany) Mercedes-Benz. “

https://www.barrons.com/articles/nio-electric-cars-could-become-an-iconic-brand-says-analyst-51601394855
